text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After putting in an exceptional performance at
the Oka Sho, Fine Motion returns to me in
sky-high spirits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her radiance is enough to inspire confidence in a
certain Umamusume who was struggling before
the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the second crown of the Triple Tiara
tour—we're heading for the Japanese Oaks!
